matches.x: among whom I saw Jaazaniah the son of Azur, and Pelatiah the son of Benaiah, princes of the people.

among whom I saw Jaazaniah the son of Azur, and Pelatiah the son of Benaiah, princes of the people.

The prophets Ezekiel and Jeremiah wrote of the divine miracle of conversion: "I will give them one heart, and I will put a new spirit within you; and I will take the stony heart out of their flesh, and will give them an heart of flesh: that they may walk in my statutes, and keep mine ordinances, and do them: and they shall be my people, and I will be their God." (Ezekiel 11:19-20.) "I will put my…

Another explanation. He is likened to stone because it destroyed a heart of stone, as it is written: And I will remove the stony heart out of their flesh, and will give them a heart of flesh (Ezek. 36:21). Which smote the image (Dan. 2:34) indicates that He will put an end to all the nations, as is said: And he shall smite the land with the rod of His mouth (Isa. 11:4). At that time Israel will…
